title: Nurse Practitioners
description: Diagnose and treat acute, episodic, or chronic illness, independently or as part of a healthcare team. May focus on health promotion and disease prevention. May order, perform, or interpret diagnostic tests such as lab work and x rays. May prescribe medication. Must be registered nurses who have specialized graduate education.

tasks.text: Maintain complete and detailed records of patients' health care plans and prognoses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop treatment plans, based on scientific rationale, standards of care, and professional practice guidelines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide patients with information needed to promote health, reduce risk factors, or prevent disease or disability.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze and interpret patients' histories, symptoms, physical findings, or diagnostic information to develop appropriate diagnoses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Diagnose or treat complex, unstable, comorbid, episodic, or emergency conditions in collaboration with other health care providers as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prescribe medication dosages, routes, and frequencies, based on such patient characteristics as age and gender.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Diagnose or treat chronic health care problems, such as high blood pressure and diabetes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prescribe medications based on efficacy, safety, and cost as legally authorized.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend diagnostic or therapeutic interventions with attention to safety, cost, invasiveness, simplicity, acceptability, adherence, and efficacy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Detect and respond to adverse drug reactions, with special attention to vulnerable populations such as infants, children, pregnant and lactating women, or older adults.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Diagnose or treat acute health care problems, such as illnesses, infections, or injuries.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Counsel patients about drug regimens and possible side effects or interactions with other substances, such as food supplements, over-the-counter (OTC) medications, or herbal remedies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Order, perform, or interpret the results of diagnostic tests, such as complete blood counts (CBCs), electrocardiograms (EKGs), and radiographs (x-rays).
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Educate patients about self-management of acute or chronic illnesses, tailoring instructions to patients' individual circumstances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain current knowledge of state legal regulations for nurse practitioner practice, including reimbursement of services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend interventions to modify behavior associated with health risks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with, or refer patients to, appropriate specialists when conditions exceed the scope of practice or expertise.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Treat or refer patients for primary care conditions, such as headaches, hypertension, urinary tract infections, upper respiratory infections, and dermatological conditions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read current literature, talk with colleagues, or participate in professional organizations or conferences to keep abreast of developments in nursing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule follow-up visits to monitor patients or evaluate health or illness care.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform routine or annual physical examinations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain departmental policies and procedures in areas such as safety and infection control.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advocate for accessible health care that minimizes environmental health risks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform primary care procedures such as suturing, splinting, administering immunizations, taking cultures, and debriding wounds.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide patients or caregivers with assistance in locating health care resources.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Keep abreast of regulatory processes and payer systems, such as Medicare, Medicaid, managed care, and private sources.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise or coordinate patient care or support staff activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
